arts.sum: Crystal Palace made it five consecutive away wins in all competitions - all by a scoreline of 2-0 - when they triumphed at Fulham on Saturday. The Eagles are within touching distance of the Premier L...

arts.ttl: Player says Monchi ‘first to understand’ why he rejected Aston Villa – Summer move a possibility
arts.sum: Aston Villa were seriously chasing Sevilla’s Loïc Badé for much of the winter market. The Villans made offers and came close to reaching an agreement with Sevilla, but the centre-back apparently refused to move to Villa Park. Spanish newspaper ABC Sevilla have had a detailed chat with Badé and they asked him about Aston Villa’s The post Player says Monchi ‘first to understand’ why he rejected Aston Villa – Summer move a possibility appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa linked striker collapses on the pitch after suffering 'head trauma'
arts.sum: Striker Moise Kean, who has been linked with a transfer to Aston Villa recently, was taken to hospital after collapsing on the pitch following a head injury during his Fiorentina side's 1-0 defeat to Hellas Verona on Sunday. Villa, who are likely to be in the market for another centre forward once this season ends after the sale of Jhon Duran in January to Al-Nassr in the Saudi Pro League, have been linked with a move in the summer transfer window to bring former Everton striker Kean back to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: The lowdown on Fulham 0 Crystal Palace 2 - Eze makes Craven Cottage his playground in comfortable away victory
arts.sum: The Eagles’ away form is Champions League, whilst the two home wins all season at Selhurst Park has Palace in the bottom five. Daniel Munoz smashed home a second midway through the second half and Oliver Glasner’s men eased to victory without any real scares.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa's top four rivals fired Marcus Rashford warning after starring role vs Chelsea
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford starred as Aston Villa came from a goal down to beat Chelsea on Saturday night, with Unai Emery's side now just two points off a place in the top four

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer's strange moment in Aston Villa defeat sums up Chelsea's struggles
arts.sum: Cole Palmer spurned a great chance in Chelsea's 2-1 defeat by Aston Villa on Saturday - and his reaction showed his frustration during a rare dry spell for the England star

arts.ttl: European soccer review: Villa's new signings kick Chelsea while they're down
arts.sum: The Premier League title race moved that much closer in Liverpool's favor after Arsenal's loss West Ham United, and Chelsea's backslide away from UEFA Champions League qualification got worse, courtesy of Aston Villa's new January signings. Two months ago, Maresca was trying to keep a lid on expectations and felt forced to play down suggestions his team were in the title race; now he's looking over his shoulder at the likes of Villa, hoping his players can find some form from somewhere.

arts.ttl: 'Holte End have a new hero' - Rashford shines in Aston Villa win
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford inspires Aston Villa to a comeback victory over Chelsea, providing assists for both of Marco Asensio's goals.
